user.title: Zhalt Evolution Connect
user.description: Enter the host and port of your Zhalt device. Defaults work for the standard captive AP setup.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Check that Home Assistant has a route to the device.
error.bad_greeting: Connected, but the device did not greet with 'CiaO'. Wrong device?

abort.already_configured: This Zhalt device is already configured.
